title: Night on Earth
synopsis:
"I'm sorry I sound calm. I assure you I'm hysterical."
Five comedic vignettes occur simultaneously in taxis across five cities. In Los Angeles, a casting agent meets a tomboy driver; in New York, an immigrant driver struggles with directions; in Paris, a blind woman challenges her chauffeur; in Rome, a driver’s confessions overwhelm a priest; and in Helsinki, workers share tragic tales. Taking his episodic format global, Jarmusch relies purely on dialogue within confined spaces to reveal profound human truths.

synopsis_lang.en:
"I'm sorry I sound calm. I assure you I'm hysterical."
Five comedic vignettes occur simultaneously in taxis across five cities. In Los Angeles, a casting agent meets a tomboy driver; in New York, an immigrant driver struggles with directions; in Paris, a blind woman challenges her chauffeur; in Rome, a driver’s confessions overwhelm a priest; and in Helsinki, workers share tragic tales. Taking his episodic format global, Jarmusch relies purely on dialogue within confined spaces to reveal profound human truths.
synopsis_lang.zh_hk:
「很抱歉我聽起來很冷靜，我向你保證我現在其實很歇斯底里。」
五個同時發生、跨越不同時區與語言的短篇故事組成 。的士裏，司機與乘客短暫交集：在洛杉磯，星探遇上拒絕當明星的女司機；在紐約，東德移民司機正為認路而苦惱；在巴黎，盲人女子與司機針鋒相對；在羅馬，司機的告解讓神父招架不住；而在赫爾辛基，工人分享悲慘的故事。占渣木殊將段落式的故事結構擴展至世界各地，透過狹小空間內的對話，勾勒出耐人尋味的人生百態。

cast: Winona Ryder, Gena Rowlands, Roberto Benigni

cast_lang.en: Winona Ryder, Gena Rowlands, Roberto Benigni
cast_lang.zh_hk: Winona Ryder, Gena Rowlands, Roberto Benigni
